feed.title: Viral Shah Lab
feed.subtitle: Viral Shah Lab studies physiologic regeneration

entry.title: Viral wins Vertex Grant
entry.content: Viral wins grant from Vertex’s CF Research Innovation Award to take a novel approach to gene therapy
entry.summary: Viral wins grant from Vertex’s CF Research Innovation Award to take a novel approach to gene therapy

entry.title: Yohana wins a CFF Student Traineeship Award!

link.title: Yohana wins a CFF Student Traineeship Award!

entry.content: Yohana is awarded a Student Traineeship Grant through the CF Foundation to study ionocytes!
entry.summary: Yohana is awarded a Student Traineeship Grant through the CF Foundation to study ionocytes!

entry.title: Viral named the inaugural “Dillon Scholar” by MGH

link.title: Viral named the inaugural “Dillon Scholar” by MGH

entry.content: Dillon Scholars Award is aimed to support promising early career investigators to purse novel lines of investigation that deviate from the expertise of the investigators’ mentors with a speciﬁc interest towards projects relating to lung transplantation and/or severe lung diseases that may necessitate transplantation.
entry.summary: Dillon Scholars Award is aimed to support promising early career investigators to purse novel lines of investigation that deviate from the expertise of the investigators’ mentors with a speciﬁc interest towards projects relating to lung transplantation and/or severe lung diseases that may necessitate transplantation.

entry.title: Viral wins “Young Physician Scientist Award” from the ASCI

link.title: Viral wins “Young Physician Scientist Award” from the ASCI

entry.content: Viral named YPSA by the American Society for Clinical Investigation
entry.summary: Viral named YPSA by the American Society for Clinical Investigation

entry.title: Juliette presents her works at the 2025 Latino Medical Student Association National Conference

link.title: Juliette presents her works at the 2025 Latino Medical Student Association National Conference

entry.content: Juliette presents her summer research project as a poster!
entry.summary: Juliette presents her summer research project as a poster!

entry.title: Juliette presents her summer work at HSCI

link.title: Juliette presents her summer work at HSCI

entry.content: Juliette spends her summer with us studying hillocks through the Harvard Stem Cell Institute. We celebrate her summer with some Flour!
entry.summary: Juliette spends her summer with us studying hillocks through the Harvard Stem Cell Institute. We celebrate her summer with some Flour!

entry.title: Yohana gets “HIGHEST HONORS” on her Senior Thesis!

link.title: Yohana gets “HIGHEST HONORS” on her Senior Thesis!

entry.content: Yohana is awarded Highest Honors - the BEST thesis - at Brandeis!
entry.summary: Yohana is awarded Highest Honors - the BEST thesis - at Brandeis!

entry.title: Hillock cake to celebrate Yohana Graduating!

link.title: Hillock cake to celebrate Yohana Graduating!

entry.title: Yohana gets another Summer Internship Award!

link.title: Yohana gets another Summer Internship Award!

entry.content: Yohana works during the school year and finishes her second summer internship in the MGH Biomedical Research Internship Program!
entry.summary: Yohana works during the school year and finishes her second summer internship in the MGH Biomedical Research Internship Program!

entry.title: Yohana “survives” her first summer
entry.content: Yohana completed her first summer internship in the MGH Biomedical Research Internship Program!
entry.summary: Yohana completed her first summer internship in the MGH Biomedical Research Internship Program!
